query:
INSERT INTO pbs_computations_branch (
                        handle,
                        transaction_id,
                        host_chain_id,
                        block_number,
                        block_hash,
                        producer_block_hash
                    )
                    SELECT input.handle, $2, $3, $4, $5, input.producer_block_hash
                    FROM UNNEST($1::BYTEA[], $6::BYTEA[])
                        AS input(handle, producer_block_hash)
                    ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
